experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
responsibilities: Migrating map infrastructure from Google Maps SDK to HERE Maps SDK, improving flexibility and provider abstraction.
Designing a modular map architecture to support multiple providers using clean architecture principles.
Implementing custom map rendering (markers, polylines, polygons) with optimized performance.
Handling map interactions (taps, selections) and integrating them with business logic layers.
Collaborating with team members to ensure scalable and maintainable map solutions.

Contributed to team knowledge sharing by documenting common pain points and debugging patterns in the codebase.

experience.title: Software Engineer
responsibilities: Contributing to an application supporting 16 banks across Egypt.

Ensured application reliability and scalability using Java and Kotlin.
